subject: Meeting in Europe
body:
Dear Jeff,

Happy New Year! I could visit you in Paris on January 21st or 22nd or 23rd. Which day is convienent for you?
I will arrive noon time to see only you and after the meeting leave back. Early after noon time is suite for me.

warmest,

Purev

Sent from my iPad
